title: Collectable Badges
description: You want a side quest? I provide you with a side quest!
body: You want a side quest? I provide you with a side quest! This little mod adds badges for each structure, which require items from that structure to obtain. Want the village badge? Grab a bell and some emeralds! Mansion badge? You'd need a totem for that! Perfect for those who want to show they're avid explorers.
